title: Handoff Trigger Check Profile
description: Configuration for a named profile that determines pass/fail thresholds and behavior of the rootnode-handoff-trigger-check Skill. Profiles are portable across users and projects; ship one per availability/risk-tolerance pattern.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the profile schema this file conforms to. Used by profile builders and migration tools to detect when a profile was authored against an older schema. Current version: 1.0.0.

name.description: Profile identifier in kebab-case. Used in the Skill's output to record which profile was applied.

description.description: Human-readable description of when this profile applies. Example: 'Aaron at desk, full review capability available, real-time corrections possible.'

threshold_rule.description: How the per-condition results combine into the overall verdict.

min_pass_count.description: Minimum number of conditions that must pass when threshold_rule is 'min_count'. Required if threshold_rule is 'min_count'; ignored otherwise.

required_conditions.description: Conditions that MUST pass regardless of other settings. Even with min_count threshold, if a required condition fails, overall verdict is FAIL.

condition_weights.description: Per-condition weights (when threshold_rule is 'weighted'). Sum of weights must equal 1.0. Required if threshold_rule is 'weighted'.

weighted_pass_threshold.description: When threshold_rule is 'weighted', the minimum weighted score for PASS verdict (e.g., 0.85).

budget_safety_margin.description: Multiplier applied to estimated token cost before comparing to budget. Higher = more conservative. Aaron-sleeping should be ≥1.3; Aaron-desk can be 1.05-1.1 since corrections are real-time.

budget_data_source.description: Where the Skill gets remaining-budget data. 'telemetry_feed' = live data from orchestrator. 'manual_input' = caller provides estimate. 'registry_path' = read from a known config file. 'no_check' = skip condition 7 (use only when budget genuinely doesn't apply, e.g., self-hosted runtime with no token cost).

telemetry_feed_url.description: Required when budget_data_source is 'telemetry_feed'. URL the Skill caller fetches budget state from.

registry_path.description: Required when budget_data_source is 'registry_path'. Filesystem path to the budget registry file.

notes.description: Optional. Free-text notes about when/how this profile is used. Useful for audit trail.
